    QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout,
    QLabel, QComboBox, QPushButton, QTreeWidget, QTreeWidgetItem, QMessageBox, QInputDialog

# Worker thread to fetch schedule without blocking UI
class FetchScheduleWorker(QThread):
    result = Signal(object)
    error = Signal(str)

    def __init__(self, year, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.year = year

    def run(self):
        try:
            # enable cache if available in project
            try:
                from src.f1_data import enable_cache
                enable_cache()
            except Exception:
                pass
            events = get_race_weekends_by_year(self.year)
            self.result.emit(events)
        except Exception as e:
            self.error.emit(str(e))

class RaceSelectionWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.worker = None
        self.loading_session = False
        self.selected_session_title = None

        self.setWindowTitle("F1 Race Replay - Session Selection")
        self._setup_ui()
        self.resize(1000, 700)
        self.setMinimumSize(800, 600)
        self.setWindowState(self.windowState())

def load_schedule(self, year):
        if self.loading_session:
            return
        self.loading_session = True
        self.schedule_tree.clear()
        # hide sessions panel while loading / when nothing selected
        try:
            self.session_panel.hide()
        except Exception:
            pass
        self.worker = FetchScheduleWorker(int(year))
        self.worker.result.connect(self.populate_schedule)
        self.worker.error.connect(self.show_error)
        self.worker.start()
new_str:
def on_filter_mode_changed(self, mode_text):
        if mode_text == "Year":
            self.filter_mode = "year"
            self.year_filter_widget.show()
            self.race_name_filter_widget.hide()
            self.load_schedule(self.year_combo.currentText())
        else:
            self.filter_mode = "race_name"
            self.year_filter_widget.hide()
            self.race_name_filter_widget.show()
            self.load_all_years_for_race_filter()

    def load_all_years_for_race_filter(self):
        if self.loading_session:
            return
        self.loading_session = True
        self.schedule_tree.clear()
        try:
            self.session_panel.hide()
        except Exception:
            pass
        years = list(range(2010, 2026))
        self.worker = FetchMultiYearScheduleWorker(years)
        self.worker.result.connect(self.populate_race_name_filter)
        self.worker.error.connect(self.show_error)
        self.worker.start()

    def populate_race_name_filter(self, events):
        self.all_events_cache = events
        self.race_names_set = set()
        for event in events:
            self.race_names_set.add(event.get("event_name", ""))
        sorted_names = sorted(self.race_names_set)
        self.race_name_combo.blockSignals(True)
        self.race_name_combo.clear()
        for name in sorted_names:
            self.race_name_combo.addItem(name)
        self.race_name_combo.blockSignals(False)
        if sorted_names:
            self.race_name_combo.setCurrentIndex(0)
            self.on_race_name_selected(sorted_names[0])
        self.loading_session = False

    def on_race_name_selected(self, race_name):
        if not race_name:
            return
        self.schedule_tree.clear()
        try:
            self.session_panel.hide()
        except Exception:
            pass
        filtered_events = [e for e in self.all_events_cache if e.get("event_name", "") == race_name]
        filtered_events.sort(key=lambda e: e.get("year", 0), reverse=True)
        for event in filtered_events:
            year_str = str(event.get("year", ""))
            round_str = str(event.get("round_number", ""))
            name = str(event.get("event_name", ""))
            country = str(event.get("country", ""))
            date = str(event.get("date", ""))
            event_item = QTreeWidgetItem([year_str, round_str, name, country, date])
            event_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, event)
            self.schedule_tree.addTopLevelItem(event_item)
        try:
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(0)
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(1)
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    def load_schedule(self, year):
        if self.loading_session:
            return
        self.loading_session = True
        self.schedule_tree.clear()
        # hide sessions panel while loading / when nothing selected
        try:
            self.session_panel.hide()
        except Exception:
            pass
        self.worker = FetchScheduleWorker(int(year))
        self.worker.result.connect(self.populate_schedule)
        self.worker.error.connect(self.show_error)
        self.worker.start()

def populate_schedule(self, events):
        for event in events:
            # Ensure all columns are strings (QTreeWidgetItem expects text)
            round_str = str(event.get("round_number", ""))
            name = str(event.get("event_name", ""))
            country = str(event.get("country", ""))
            date = str(event.get("date", ""))

            event_item = QTreeWidgetItem([round_str, name, country, date])
            event_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, event)
            self.schedule_tree.addTopLevelItem(event_item)

        # Make sure the round column is wide enough to be visible
        try:
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(0)
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(1)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self.loading_session = False
new_str:
def populate_schedule(self, events):
        year = self.year_combo.currentText()
        for event in events:
            # Ensure all columns are strings (QTreeWidgetItem expects text)
            year_str = str(year)
            round_str = str(event.get("round_number", ""))
            name = str(event.get("event_name", ""))
            country = str(event.get("country", ""))
            date = str(event.get("date", ""))

            event["year"] = int(year)
            event_item = QTreeWidgetItem([year_str, round_str, name, country, date])
            event_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, event)
            self.schedule_tree.addTopLevelItem(event_item)

        # Make sure the round column is wide enough to be visible
        try:
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(0)
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(1)
            self.schedule_tree.resizeColumnToContents(2)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self.loading_session = False
